title: Crusty Ciabatta with Bittersweet Chocolate Spread
description: A simple dessert recipe featuring a crunchy ciabatta crust topped with rich bittersweet chocolate spread.
instructions: Cut the ciabatta into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with 2 tablespoons of butter and toss to coat.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
In a separate bowl, melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter and combine with the chopped chocolate.
Spread the chocolate mixture onto the cooled ciabatta cubes.
